title: Lands UnExplored
description: A kitchen sink modpack with create and AE2 in mind.
body:
![MPP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/883279ee0fcc9aea9f00de7569fb6f5bedddc5b2.png)
###  A kitchen sink modpack with create and AE2 as main mods. It also contains a lot of new structures, weapons, mobs and QoL mods. it is made for low end PCs because, a lot of people have bad PC (me including)


_**Warning: Even after i said it is for low end PCs, I only tested this with 10gb ram alocated so dont expect this modpack running smothly with low amount of ram alocated**_


Also this is my first time making a modpack so there might be some issues, but i hope there aren't. If you find any issues with mods let me know.


Some screenshots:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# No more spoilers :)     Enjoy the modpack

also feel free to remove item alchemy mod, if you feel its too easy
